response.overview: Qistina, a farm worker facing various challenges with her mother, falls in love with Luqman, the son of Tuan Budi, the farm owner. However, their love is fraught with difficulties following Tuan Budi's death when their relationship is plagued by slander from Aniq and Luqman's family. Qistina's fate becomes even more tragic when she is abandoned while pregnant by Luqman, who has been influenced by the slander, forcing Qistina to leave and build a life of her own.
response.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna
